title: Track Campaign Performance
description: Get impressions, budget, ROAS, and pacing data for your campaigns.

steps.title: Understand pacing data
steps.description: Pacing data shows how your campaigns are performing against their goals - impressions delivered, budget spent, and projected completion.

steps.title: Query campaign pacing data
steps.description: Fetch performance metrics for all campaigns in your organization.
steps.tip: Use 'first' to limit results per page.

steps.title: Calculate delivery rate
steps.description: Compare totalImpressions to impressionGoal to see if campaigns are on track.
steps.tip: daysIntoFlight and daysLeft help you understand pacing relative to the campaign timeline.

tips: roas (Return on Ad Spend) shows revenue generated per dollar spent
budgetLeft and daysLeft help predict if you'll hit your goals
Use aggregate.count to see total campaigns
